zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier於大約0995年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷奧納-素-維艾艾時，他的父親Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I31歲，母親Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers20歲。他於1025年與Mathilde de Vienne在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1074年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier于大约0995年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷奧納-素-維艾艾时，他的父亲Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I31岁，母亲Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers20岁。他于1025年与Mathilde de Vienne在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1074年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comborn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Colburn
meanings: habitational name usually from Colburn in Catterick (North Yorkshire), named from Old English cōl ‘cool’ or col ‘coal’+ burna ‘stream’ (often confused with Old Norse brunnr ‘spring, stream’), but sometimes perhaps from a minor place so named, such as Coalburn in South Wingfield (Derbyshire) or Coldbourne in Bramley (Surrey).
from the Middle English personal name Colborn, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Kolbiǫrn, Kolbiorn, from kol ‘coal’ + biǫrn ‘bear’.
variant of Colbran, from the Middle English personal name Colbrand (Old Norse Kolbrandr, Kolbrand, from kol ‘coal’ + brandr ‘sword-blade, firebrand’).

nameMeanings.name: Turenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Donat, Emile, Francois, Philomene, Serge, Yves.
French: habitational name from Turenne, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, e.g. in Corrèze, named with pre-Latin tur ‘height’.
History: Pierre Blanchard dit Turenne from Poitiers in Vienne, France, married Gertrude-Michelle Dupuis in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1733.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier was born about 0995, in Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I, was 31 and his mother, Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers, was 20. He married Mathilde de Vienne in 1025, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1074, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier est né environ 0995, à Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Vienne en 1025, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1074, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.Mayenne, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier um 0995 in Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I 31 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers 20. Er hat 1025 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Mathilde de Vienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1074 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

ko.Mayenne, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier(이)가 대략 0995년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 르그나c-수-브e즈e르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1025년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 Mathilde de Vienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1074년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Mayenne, France: меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier родился около 0995 г. в местности оргнак-сур-вeзeр, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Vicomte de Comborn et de Turennes Ebles de Turennes I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Normandie Abbess of Montvilliers, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Vienne в 1025 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1074 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.
